description_long: This is a modern two-story house situated on a spacious, landscaped lot surrounded by a black picket fence. The house features a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a minimalist geometric design with clean lines. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a detached garage, and a backyard with various trees, shrubs, and a patio area furnished with outdoor seating and a table. The front yard is landscaped with a mix of ornamental trees, bushes, and a manicured lawn, while the backyard offers ample open space and privacy from tall hedges and trees. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light-colored material, contrasting with the dark window frames and fence. The overall setting suggests a contemporary suburban residence designed for comfort and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalist landscaping, set within a fenced suburban lot featuring a driveway, garage, and spacious yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with various trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, open lawn, and the back facade with large windows and patio area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, backyard patio, and dense tree line along the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite front view focusing on the garage, driveway, and a different angle of the landscaped front yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, large door, and direct access from the driveway, no porch or decorative columns.
